headline: How The Inventiva (ENXTPA:IVA) Story Is Shifting With Lanifibranor And Analyst Revisions
summary: Inventiva’s updated analyst narrative now reflects a Fair Value move from €8.98 to about €10.00, a shift that aligns with the refreshed price target range highlighted in recent research. This reset sits against a backdrop of contrasting views on how effectively lanifibranor can progress through later stages and what that could mean for the company’s overall appeal within small to mid cap biotech coverage. Read on to see how to track these changing views and what to watch as the story...
